title: Velvety Nutty Pistachio Bite Sizer
description: This light Algerian dish features ready rolled shortcrust pastry encased with a velvety nutty mixture and served as an easy snack option, perfect for the whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: Pistachio Paste
ingredients.notes: Available in some grocery stores or online, can be homemade from fresh pistachios and sugar

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with pure vanilla paste if available

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Optional, can enhance the flavors of pistachio and coconut milk

instructions: Place each sheet of pastry in a palm size circle.
Using a teaspoon, spread the pistachio paste evenly across the middle of one pastry sheet. Leave about an inch around the edge unspreaded for sealing.
Drizzle half of the coconut milk over the pistachio paste and sprinkle with a pinch of salt if using.
Place another layer of the ready rolled pastry on top, seal edges by crimping or rolling slightly over to hold in place.
Repeat steps 3-5 until all ingredients are used up. Ensure there is enough coconut milk and pistachio paste for each bite size sizer.
Bake in preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes, check every minute with a toothpick inserted into the middle to ensure it’s fully cooked (the center should be dry when done).
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving as an instant snack option.
